title: Stop Removing Tasks That Haven't Been Updated in 4 Months from My Work
excerpt: Monday.com needs to stop removing tasks that haven’t been updated in 4 months from the My Work table. It is incredibly important that removal is not up to Monday.com and is up to the person who views their My Work table …

posts.author: aclemons (Amanda Clemons)
posts.cookedHtml: Monday.com needs to stop removing tasks that haven’t been updated in 4 months from the My Work table. It is incredibly important that removal is not up to Monday.com and is up to the person who views their My Work table often. With my long-term planning, I use tasks to plan out what the next few months will look like and My Work allows me to see that scheduled out. But if the tasks are removed, I have to go back to our entire team board and try to sort through what tasks are mine and my coworkers just to figure out what is being removed. Please, please make this an optional feature or discontinue it because it should not be up to Monday.com to decide what gets shown and what doesn’t with my work.

posts.author: TeamEasy (Easy Mondays)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @aclemons ,

In the meantime, we’d recommend setting up an automation to make a small change in the item/pulse for you, so it’s not being removed from your My Work section. Even if it’s a dummy status label or an update it would mean your items are not 4 months ‘stale’ and therefore not being removed.

We can help you if needed
teameasy@easy-mondays.com

posts.author: aclemons (Amanda Clemons)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you, can I see an example of this please?

posts.author: TeamEasy (Easy Mondays)
